---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or behavior.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem you're trying to solve

<!-- What's the user-facing pain point? Skip "we should add X" framing
     and start from the situation a real user runs into. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. Sketch the UX or API. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem, and why this one is better
     (or worse, but still worth considering). -->

## Out of scope reminder

Bird CMS optimizes for surface-area minimalism. Strong feature
candidates:

- close a real, recurring authoring or operations gap
- compose with the file-as-source-of-truth model
- ship without bloating the install image or admin nav

If your idea fights one of those, mention how the trade-off pays off.
